featureDefs.name: Pazaryeri connector hub
featureDefs.desc: Trendyol/Hepsiburada/Amazon tipli connector sozlesmeleri; eslesme, kota ve hata yonetimi. Headless cekirdek, arkada orkestrasyon.

featureDefs.name: Feed besleme
featureDefs.desc: Google Shopping / Meta katalog beslemeleri; urun verisi periyodik veya event-tetikli yayinlanir.

featureDefs.name: Siparis konsolidasyonu
featureDefs.desc: Tum kanallarin siparisi tek kuyrukta (outbox deseni); cift islem onleme idempotency ile.

featureDefs.name: Yorum / itibar havuzu
featureDefs.desc: Kanal yorumlarini tek havuzda toplama-yanitlama; itibar takibi tek arayuzden.

integration.shouldIntegrate: Evet — aday yatay stack; Commerce'ten bagimsiz satilir, baglaninca stok gercek zamanli.
integration.kernel: Authz (kanal/connector yetkisi capability-bagli), tenancy (satici verisi RLS), event-bus (siparis/stok event'leri).
integration.core: Connector ve siparis Contract semasi; otomatik audit + bitemporal.
integration.modules: s-channel-hub (connector'lar), scale-outbox (siparis konsolidasyon kuyrugu), stack-commerce (stok kopru).
integration.apps: Channel App'i; Commerce baglaninca stok/fiyat senkronu downstream.

moduleUsage: stack-channel: Pazaryeri siparisi gelir -> connector normalize eder -> outbox tek kuyruga yazar -> idempotency_key ile cift islem onlenir -> Commerce bagliysa stok decrement event'i yayinlanir.
ecaExample:
trigger:
  event: channel.order.received
condition:
  all:
    - actor.capability >= "channel:sync"
    - connector.healthy
    - not loop_detected
action:
  - emit: channel.order.consolidated
  - emit: commerce.stock.reserve_requested
guards:
  max_depth: 6
  idempotency_key: "chorder:{channel}:{external_order_id}"
  external_effects: step_up_required
securityNotes: Connector kimlik bilgileri (API anahtarlari) pii/secret kapsaminda; vault'ta tutulur, capability channel:admin ile erisilir.
Siparis konsolidasyonu deny-by-default: yalniz channel:sync hareket uretir; cross-tenant siparis enjekte edilemez (RLS).
Dis pazaryeri yaniti untrusted: normalize sirasinda dogrulama, idempotency ile replay korumasi.

perfNotes.code: Connector cagrilari rate-limit/kota bilincli; hata halinde outbox retry + dead-letter.
perfNotes.perf: Yuksek hacimli siparis akisi outbox ile asenkron; kanal API kotasi connector seviyesinde backpressure ile yonetilir.

testNotes: Ayni external_order_id ikinci kez -> cift siparis olusmamali (idempotency).
